name: Banana Caramel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, flour, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Stir in cold water and egg yolks; beat smooth.
3. Gradually stir in boiling water, then cook, stirring constantly, about 3 minutes, until smoothly thickened.
4. Stir in butter, vanilla, and evaporated milk.
5. Cool slightly, then pour into baked pie shell.
6. Shortly before serving, slice bananas and arrange over filling.
7. Top with whipped cream or with meringue made out of the 2 leftover egg whites.
